title: Giftmaker Pack 10 Square Christmas Cards Family Friends 2 Designs Traditional Santa
features: SPREAD THE HOLIDAY CHEER: Send out some magical Christmas spirit this year with this stylish giftmaker Christmas card box set. Ideal for giving to work colleagues or passing out to school friends
PERFECT FOR THE FESTIVE SEASON: If you're looking for a beautifully designed Christmas card pack this year, full of festive joy and Christmas spirit then this pack is ideal for you
TRADITIONAL FESTIVE CHRISTMAS DESIGNS: Each pack has two different card designs of the same theme, each with a Christmas Greeting inside. Design: Traditional Santa & Reindeer
ENJOY A SUSTAINABLE CHRISTMAS: All the cards in this Christmas card box are fully recyclable and plastic free. Feel even better when spreading that Christmas joy with these eco friendly cards
PERFECTLY SIZED: This multi-pack of Christmas cards contains 10 cards that are an easy to send letter size, to help spread the cost of your Xmas. Approx size: 140 x 140mm
description: Spread the holiday cheer with this stylish giftmaker Christmas card box set featuring 2 festive designs. If you're looking for a fun cute designed Christmas card pack this year then this pack is ideal for you.
